mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS assignment_count, COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) * COUNT(DISTINCT su.id) AS expected_submissions, SUM(CASE WHEN s.id IS NOT NULL AND s.status IN (1,2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS submitted_count, SUM(CASE WHEN s.is_late = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS late_count FROM assignment a INNER JOIN assignment_target_class atc ON atc.assignment_id = a.id AND atc.class_id = #{classId} AND atc.deleted = 0 INNER JOIN sys_user_class suc ON suc.class_id = atc.class_id AND suc.deleted = 0 INNER JOIN sys_user su ON su.id = suc.user_id AND su.deleted = 0 AND su.id IN (SELECT user_id FROM sys_user_role WHERE role_id = 4) LEFT JOIN assignment_submission s ON s.assignment_id = a.id AND s.student_id = su.id AND s.deleted = 0 AND s.status IN (1,2) WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.deadline BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}

SELECT AVG(s.score) FROM assignment_submission s INNER JOIN assignment a ON a.id = s.assignment_id INNER JOIN assignment_target_class atc ON atc.assignment_id = a.id WHERE atc.class_id = #{classId} AND a.deadline BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND s.status = 2 AND s.deleted = 0

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN s.status = 2 AND s.score >= 90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS b90, SUM(CASE WHEN s.status = 2 AND s.score >= 80 AND s.score < 90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS b80, SUM(CASE WHEN s.status = 2 AND s.score >= 70 AND s.score < 80 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS b70, SUM(CASE WHEN s.status = 2 AND s.score >= 60 AND s.score < 70 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS b60, SUM(CASE WHEN s.status = 2 AND s.score < 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS bFail FROM assignment_submission s INNER JOIN assignment a ON a.id = s.assignment_id INNER JOIN assignment_target_class atc ON atc.assignment_id = a.id WHERE atc.class_id = #{classId} AND a.deadline BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND s.deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) * COALESCE(stu.cnt, 0) AS expected FROM assignment a INNER JOIN assignment_target_class atc ON atc.assignment_id = a.id AND atc.class_id = #{classId} AND atc.deleted = 0 CROSS JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT suc.user_id) AS cnt FROM sys_user_class suc INNER JOIN sys_user su ON su.id = suc.user_id AND su.deleted = 0 WHERE suc.class_id = #{classId} AND suc.deleted = 0 AND su.id IN (SELECT user_id FROM sys_user_role WHERE role_id = 4) ) stu WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.deadline BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM assignment_submission s INNER JOIN assignment a ON a.id = s.assignment_id INNER JOIN assignment_target_class atc ON atc.assignment_id = a.id WHERE atc.class_id = #{classId} AND a.deadline BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND s.status IN (1,2) AND s.deleted = 0

SELECT a.id AS assignmentId, a.title AS title, a.deadline AS deadline, AVG(s.score) AS avgScore, COUNT(s.id) AS submittedCount FROM assignment a INNER JOIN assignment_target_class atc ON atc.assignment_id = a.id AND atc.class_id = #{classId} AND atc.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN assignment_submission s ON s.assignment_id = a.id AND s.status = 2 AND s.deleted = 0 WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.deadline BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY a.id, a.title, a.deadline ORDER BY a.deadline

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(a.deadline, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(s.id) AS gradedCount, AVG(s.score) AS avgScore FROM assignment a INNER JOIN assignment_target_class atc ON atc.assignment_id = a.id AND atc.class_id = #{classId} AND atc.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN assignment_submission s ON s.assignment_id = a.id AND s.status = 2 AND s.deleted = 0 WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.deadline BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(a.deadline, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS assignment_count, SUM(CASE WHEN s.status IN (1,2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS submitted_count, SUM(CASE WHEN s.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS graded_count, AVG(CASE WHEN s.status = 2 THEN s.score END) AS avg_score, MAX(CASE WHEN s.status = 2 THEN s.score END) AS max_score, MIN(CASE WHEN s.status = 2 THEN s.score END) AS min_score, STDDEV(CASE WHEN s.status = 2 THEN s.score END) AS std_score, SUM(CASE WHEN s.is_late = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS late_count FROM assignment a INNER JOIN assignment_target_class atc ON atc.assignment_id = a.id AND atc.deleted = 0 AND atc.class_id IN ( SELECT class_id FROM sys_user_class WHERE user_id = #{studentId} AND deleted = 0 ) LEFT JOIN assignment_submission s ON s.assignment_id = a.id AND s.student_id = #{studentId} AND (s.deleted = 0 OR s.id IS NULL) WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.deadline BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}

SELECT a.id AS assignmentId, a.title AS title, a.deadline AS deadline, s.score AS score FROM assignment a INNER JOIN assignment_target_class atc ON atc.assignment_id = a.id AND atc.deleted = 0 AND atc.class_id IN ( SELECT class_id FROM sys_user_class WHERE user_id = #{studentId} AND deleted = 0 ) LEFT JOIN assignment_submission s ON s.assignment_id = a.id AND s.student_id = #{studentId} AND s.status = 2 AND s.deleted = 0 WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.deadline BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY a.deadline

SELECT a.id AS assignmentId, a.title AS title, a.deadline AS deadline, COALESCE(s.status, 0) AS status FROM assignment a INNER JOIN assignment_target_class atc ON atc.assignment_id = a.id AND atc.deleted = 0 AND atc.class_id IN ( SELECT class_id FROM sys_user_class WHERE user_id = #{studentId} AND deleted = 0 ) LEFT JOIN assignment_submission s ON s.assignment_id = a.id AND s.student_id = #{studentId} AND s.deleted = 0 WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.deadline BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND (s.id IS NULL OR s.status = 0) ORDER BY a.deadline
